title: Automation Recipe for when dropdown menu IS NOT...

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello!
When adding an additional condition to a trigger with a dropdown menu there are only positive logicals: contains, is, is all of them… I would like to add a it is not en the logicals, cause at the moment i had to add all the labels except one.

What are you trying to achieve

Add a conditional on a automation that when dropdown is not… then do…
